_comment: Self-modification controls. The kill switch and caps are read fresh on every run.
_kill_switch_note: Set self_modification_enabled=false to FREEZE all self-modification instantly. The desk keeps trading with its existing tools; it just stops writing/changing code. Default false until you have watched it run.
_min_bets_note: Do not let the loop rewrite tools until there is enough resolved history for the walk-forward backtest to be a meaningful judge (research: avoid optimizing on noise).
